name: Aggressive
description: This enemy intends to [gold]Attack[/gold] {IsMultiplayer:everyone |}for [blue]{Damage}[/blue] damage{Repeat:plural:| [blue]{}[/blue] times}.
description_zh: 这个敌人将要[gold]攻击[/gold]{IsMultiplayer:所有人|}造成[blue]{Damage}[/blue]点伤害{Repeat:choose(1):|[blue]{}[/blue]次}。

name: Empower
description: This enemy intends to use a [gold]Buff[/gold].
description_zh: 这个敌人将要使用一个[gold]强化效果[/gold]。

name: Malicious
description: This enemy intends to apply [gold]Afflictions[/gold] on your cards.
description_zh: 这个敌人将要对你的卡牌施加[gold]侵蚀[/gold]。

name: Death Blow
description: This creature is trying to take you down with it. It will attack you for [blue]{Damage}[/blue] damage before being destroyed.
description_zh: 这个生物试图拉你一起陪葬。它会在被摧毁前攻击你造成[blue]{Damage}[/blue]点伤害。

name: Strategic
description: This enemy intends to apply a [gold]Debuff[/gold] to you.
description_zh: 这个敌人将要对你施加一个[gold]负面效果[/gold]。

name: Strategic
description: This enemy intends to apply a powerful [gold]Debuff[/gold] to you.
description_zh: 这个敌人将要对你施加一个强大的[gold]负面效果[/gold]。

name: Defensive
description: This enemy intends to [gold]Block[/gold] on its turn.
description_zh: 这个敌人将会在其回合获得[gold]格挡[/gold]。

name: Sleeping
description: This enemy is doing nothing this turn.
description_zh: 这个敌人本回合不会采取任何行动。

name: Strategic
description: This enemy intends to give you [blue]{CardCount}[/blue] [gold]Status[/gold] {CardCount:plural:card|cards}.
description_zh: 这个敌人将会给你[blue]{CardCount}[/blue]张[gold]状态[/gold]牌。

name: Stunned
description: This enemy can't act on its next turn.
description_zh: 这个敌人在其下一回合无法行动。

name: Summon
description_zh: 这个敌人将要召唤[gold]怪物[/gold]。

name: Unknown
description_zh: 这个敌人将要进行某种[gold]未知[/gold]行动。
